headline: BRT Systems Underperform in 4 Cities at 35% of Projection
context: BRT systems in Iskandar Putrajaya Sunway and Klang carry only 35% of projected daily ridership four years after launch.

cards.big: 4 BRT systems carrying only 35% of projected riders after 4 years
cards.sub: Combined daily ridership of 42,000 falls short of 120,000 projection

cards.big: Iskandar BRT carries 8,000 daily versus projected 35,000
cards.sub: Route passes through low-density areas with inadequate feeder connections

cards.big: Sunway BRT most successful at 65% target serving 18,000 daily
cards.sub: Dedicated elevated guideway avoids traffic but serves only 5.4km corridor

cards.big: Combined annual operating losses reached RM180 million in 2025
cards.sub: Fare revenue covers only 28% of operating costs across all 4 systems

cards.big: BRT underperformance tests whether transit planning accounts for last-mile connectivity
BRT at 35% of projected ridership in 4 cities. Route design determines whether transit succeeds or fails.
